title: Benoicanthus gruicollis
taxonomy: Benoicanthus gruicollis is classified within the family Gesneriaceae, which consists of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. This family is part of the order Lamiales, which comprises various flowering plant families. The order Lamiales is further classified within the clade Asterids, a group of flowering plants that also includes the families of mint, lavender, and snapdragon. The clade Asterids is part of the larger clade Angiosperm, which includes all flowering plants. As a whole, Benoicanthus gruicollis is classified within the kingdom Plantae.
